title: Ring of Invisibility
description: Wear this ring to become completely invisible as long as it is equipped. Perfect for stealth and exploration.
body:
# 🪄 Invisibility Ring Mod

**Version:** v1 (for Minecraft Java 1.21.5)
**Category:** Tool / Magic

---
## How to get it?
![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56d154e9f41fd3a81ff4b29e59ef7f0d218ccfb6.png)
## Description

The **Invisibility Ring Mod** adds a magical ring to your game that grants your character complete invisibility. Once activated, the ring makes you invisible and keeps you that way until you deactivate it.


## Uses

- A simple gold ring that fits well in your inventory.

- Ideal for stealth, escape, or exploration.

- Invisibility lasts until you consciously turn it off.


## Who is it for?

- Players who want to act undetected.

- Perfect for adventures, stealth missions, or creative role-playing.

- A minimalist, functional magical item without unnecessary frills.
